ddls:
CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the player */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the player */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position played by the player */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team the player belongs to */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the player */,
  "handedness" TEXT /* Hitting or throwing hand of the player */,
  "height" REAL /* Height of the player in inches */,
  "weight" INTEGER /* Weight of the player in pounds */,
  "experience_years" INTEGER /* Number of years of professional experience */,
  "jersey_number" INTEGER /* Jersey number of the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the team is based */,
  "stadium" TEXT /* Stadium where the team plays */,
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team manager */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the team was founded */,
  "website" TEXT /* Official website of the team */,
  "owner_name" TEXT /* Name of the team owner */,
  "general_manager" TEXT /* Name of the general manager */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_manager_id FOREIGN KEY ("manager_id") REFERENCES managers ("manager_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "managers" (
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each manager */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the manager */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the manager */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the manager */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date the manager started their tenure */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date the manager ended their tenure (if applicable) */,
  "experience_years" INTEGER /* Number of years of managerial experience */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("manager_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "home_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the home team */,
  "away_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the away team */,
  "game_date" TEXT /* Date the game was played */,
  "stadium" TEXT /* Stadium where the game was played */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Attendance at the game */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* Weather conditions during the game */,
  "umpire_id" INTEGER /* ID of the umpire officiating the game */,
  "game_type" TEXT /* Type of game (e.g., regular season, playoff) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_home_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("home_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_umpire_id FOREIGN KEY ("umpire_id") REFERENCES umpires ("umpire_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_away_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("away_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "umpires" (
  "umpire_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each umpire */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the umpire */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the umpire */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the umpire */,
  "years_of_service" INTEGER /* Number of years the umpire has been in service */,
  "experience_level" TEXT /* Experience level of the umpire (e.g., rookie, veteran) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("umpire_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_games" (
  "player_game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player game entry */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position played by the player in the game */,
  "batting_order" INTEGER /* Batting order of the player */,
  "at_bats" INTEGER /* Number of at-bats the player had */,
  "hits" INTEGER /* Number of hits the player made */,
  "runs" INTEGER /* Number of runs scored by the player */,
  "rbis" INTEGER /* Number of runs batted in by the player */,
  "walks" INTEGER /* Number of walks by the player */,
  "strikeouts" INTEGER /* Number of strikeouts by the player */,
  "home_runs" INTEGER /* Number of home runs by the player */,
  "pitching_outcomes" TEXT /* Pitching outcomes (e.g., wins, losses, saves) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_games_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_games_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pitching_stats" (
  "pitching_stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each pitching stat entry */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "month" INTEGER /* Month of the statistics */,
  "wins" INTEGER /* Number of wins */,
  "losses" INTEGER /* Number of losses */,
  "era" REAL /* Earned run average */,
  "cg" INTEGER /* Number of complete games */,
  "ip" REAL /* Innings pitched */,
  "so" INTEGER /* Number of strikeouts */,
  "whip" REAL /* Walks plus hits per inning pitched */,
  "avg" REAL /* Opponent batting average */,
  "saves" INTEGER /* Number of saves */,
  "holds" INTEGER /* Number of holds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pitching_stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pitching_stats_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "batting_stats" (
  "batting_stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each batting stat entry */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "month" INTEGER /* Month of the statistics */,
  "at_bats" INTEGER /* Number of at-bats */,
  "hits" INTEGER /* Number of hits */,
  "runs" INTEGER /* Number of runs scored */,
  "rbis" INTEGER /* Number of runs batted in */,
  "walks" INTEGER /* Number of walks */,
  "strikeouts" INTEGER /* Number of strikeouts */,
  "home_runs" INTEGER /* Number of home runs */,
  "batting_average" REAL /* Batting average */,
  "stolen_bases" INTEGER /* Number of stolen bases */,
  "on_base_percentage" REAL /* On-base percentage */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("batting_stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_batting_stats_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "seasons" (
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each season */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the season */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the season */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the season */,
  "champion_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the champion team */,
  "most_valuable_player" INTEGER /* ID of the Most Valuable Player (MVP) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_records" (
  "record_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team record entry */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* ID of the season */,
  "wins" INTEGER /* Number of wins */,
  "losses" INTEGER /* Number of losses */,
  "ties" INTEGER /* Number of ties */,
  "win_percentage" REAL /* Win percentage */,
  "playoff_status" TEXT /* Playoff status (e.g., qualified, eliminated) */,
  "division_rank" INTEGER /* Division rank (e.g., 1st, 2nd, 3rd) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("record_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_records_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_records_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_seasons" (
  "player_season_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player season entry */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* ID of the season */,
  "total_at_bats" INTEGER /* Total at-bats in the season */,
  "total_hits" INTEGER /* Total hits in the season */,
  "total_runs" INTEGER /* Total runs scored in the season */,
  "total_rbis" INTEGER /* Total runs batted in in the season */,
  "total_walks" INTEGER /* Total walks in the season */,
  "total_strikeouts" INTEGER /* Total strikeouts in the season */,
  "total_home_runs" INTEGER /* Total home runs in the season */,
  "batting_average" REAL /* Batting average in the season */,
  "total_ip" REAL /* Total innings pitched in the season */,
  "total_wins" INTEGER /* Total wins in the season */,
  "total_losses" INTEGER /* Total losses in the season */,
  "total_era" REAL /* Total earned run average in the season */,
  "total_whip" REAL /* Total walks plus hits per inning pitched in the season */,
  "awards" TEXT /* Awards won by the player in the season (e.g., MVP, Rookie of the Year) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_season_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_seasons_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_seasons_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stadiums" (
  "stadium_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stadium */,
  "stadium_name" TEXT /* Name of the stadium */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the stadium is located */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the stadium */,
  "built_year" INTEGER /* Year the stadium was built */,
  "grass_type" TEXT /* Type of grass used in the stadium */,
  "field_dimensions" TEXT /* Field dimensions (e.g., outfield distances, foul territory) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stadium_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_data" (
  "weather_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather data entry */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game */,
  "temperature" REAL /* Temperature during the game */,
  "humidity" REAL /* Humidity during the game */,
  "wind_speed" REAL /* Wind speed during the game */,
  "wind_direction" TEXT /* Wind direction during the game */,
  "precipitation" TEXT /* Precipitation during the game */,
  "conditions" TEXT /* Weather conditions (e.g., sunny, cloudy, rainy) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("weather_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_data_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "playoff_series" (
  "series_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each playoff series */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* ID of the season */,
  "round" TEXT /* Round of the playoffs (e.g., Division Series, Championship Series, World Series) */,
  "home_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the home team */,
  "away_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the away team */,
  "winner_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the winning team */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the series */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the series */,
  "series_mvp" INTEGER /* ID of the series MVP */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("series_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_playoff_series_home_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("home_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_playoff_series_away_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("away_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_playoff_series_winner_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("winner_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_playoff_series_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "playoff_games" (
  "playoff_game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each playoff game */,
  "series_id" INTEGER /* ID of the playoff series */,
  "game_date" TEXT /* Date the game was played */,
  "home_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the home team */,
  "away_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the away team */,
  "home_score" INTEGER /* Score of the home team */,
  "away_score" INTEGER /* Score of the away team */,
  "umpire_id" INTEGER /* ID of the umpire officiating the game */,
  "game_type" TEXT /* Type of game (e.g., Game 1, Game 7) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("playoff_game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_playoff_games_away_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("away_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_playoff_games_umpire_id FOREIGN KEY ("umpire_id") REFERENCES umpires ("umpire_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_playoff_games_series_id FOREIGN KEY ("series_id") REFERENCES playoff_series ("series_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_playoff_games_home_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("home_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role (e.g., view, edit, delete) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user's role */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "leagues" (
  "league_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each league */,
  "league_name" TEXT /* Name of the league */,
  "division_count" INTEGER /* Number of divisions in the league */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("league_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "divisions" (
  "division_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each division */,
  "division_name" TEXT /* Name of the division */,
  "league_id" INTEGER /* ID of the league the division belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("division_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_league_division" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "league_id" INTEGER /* ID of the league the team belongs to */,
  "division_id" INTEGER /* ID of the division the team belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_league_division_league_id FOREIGN KEY ("league_id") REFERENCES leagues ("league_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_league_division_division_id FOREIGN KEY ("division_id") REFERENCES divisions ("division_id")
)
